untranslatable_reason: The signal requires identification of a specific candlestick pattern (two peaks forming overhead resistance) and detection of downward retracement within uptrend. These are pattern recognition requirements that cannot be expressed using only the allowed price/technical indicators. The 'two peaks at B' and 'overhead resistance extending backward in time' are qualitative pattern features requiring visual/structural analysis, not quantifiable indicator thresholds.
translation_notes: Attempted to approximate using pivot points (r1 as resistance) and price position relative to moving average to suggest uptrend context, but this does not capture the true pattern logic. Stop placement marked as AUTHOR_SILENT was set to conservative 2.0% default. Author did not specify success rates or volume trends, so these were omitted.
